name: Harry Potter
tagline: Look up Harry Potter books, characters, houses, and spells
description: Retrieve structured data about Harry Potter books, characters, Hogwarts houses, and spells from a free, community-run REST API available in six languages. No account or API key is required.

auth.hint: No credential required. This is a free public API with no account or API key.

tools.name: list_books
tools.description: List Harry Potter books with title, original title, release date, description, page count, and cover image.

params.name: lang
params.description: Language code: en, es, fr, it, pt, or uk.

params.name: index
params.description: Return only the single item at this index in the full list.

params.name: max
params.description: Crop the returned list to this many items.

params.name: page
params.description: When used with max, the page of results to start cropping from.

params.name: search
params.description: Search across all book fields and return the best matches, e.g. "Chamber of Secrets".

tools.name: list_characters
tools.description: List Harry Potter characters with full name, nickname, Hogwarts house, actor, and portrait image.

params.name: lang
params.description: Language code: en, es, fr, it, pt, or uk.

params.name: index
params.description: Return only the single item at this index in the full list.

params.name: max
params.description: Crop the returned list to this many items.

params.name: page
params.description: When used with max, the page of results to start cropping from.

params.name: search
params.description: Search across all character fields and return the best matches, e.g. "Weasley".

tools.name: list_houses
tools.description: List the four Hogwarts houses with founder, colors, animal, and emoji.

params.name: lang
params.description: Language code: en, es, fr, it, pt, or uk.

params.name: index
params.description: Return only the single item at this index in the full list.

params.name: search
params.description: Search across all house fields and return the best matches, e.g. "Gryffindor".

tools.name: list_spells
tools.description: List Harry Potter spells with their names and usage descriptions.

params.name: lang
params.description: Language code: en, es, fr, it, pt, or uk.

params.name: index
params.description: Return only the single item at this index in the full list.

params.name: max
params.description: Crop the returned list to this many items.

params.name: page
params.description: When used with max, the page of results to start cropping from.

params.name: search
params.description: Search across all spell fields and return the best matches, e.g. "Expelliarmus".
